narrative:
Washington Twp (precinct in Harrison County) has 336 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.6 percentage points.
